Class-Paladin 20 — Female Human Paladin: 20
Strength: 17 (+3) Dexterity: 14 (+2) Constitution: 10 (+0) Intelligence: 12 (+1) Wisdom: 12 (+1) Charisma: 15 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Neutral Deity: Celtic-Manannan Mac Lir (LN)
Ability Boosts: Constitution: 2; Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 830269/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 255/510
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 7 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; Fighting Style: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Paladin (Paladin Fighting Style); Paladin (Paladin Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Boon Of Truesight; Grappler; Magic Initiate (Druid); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Savage Attacker; Two-Weapon Fighting Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Paladin Features: Abjure Foes; Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Aura Expansion; Aura Of Courage; Aura Of Devotion; Aura Of Protection; Blessed Warrior; Channel Divinity; Divine Sense; Epic Boon; Extra Attack; Faithful Steed; Fighting Style; Holy Nimbus; Lay On Hands; Oath Of Devotion Spells; Oath Of Devotion; Paladin Fighting Style; Paladin Subclass; Paladin's Smite; Radiant Strikes; Restoring Touch; Sacred Weapon; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Athletics, Insight, Intimidation, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Smite Of Protection; Spellcasting; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Paladin Fighting Style: 1 selection
Paladin Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; Insight; Medicine; Religion
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +7 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +1 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +7
Athletics: (str) +9 Medicine: (wis) +7 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) +1 Survival: (wis) +1
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Skill Notes:
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Has 60' Truesight
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Divine Sense: R60' Can use Channel Divinity to sense the location and type of celestials, fiends, undead, consecration, and desecration for 10 min
Combat
Hit Points: 79 Initiative: +8 Armor Class: 17
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Splint Shield: None Weapons: Greataxe (+9 1d12+3 S; Cleave); Maul (+9 2d6+3 B; Topple); Shortbow (+8 1d6+2 P R80/320; Vex); Unarmed (+9 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Abjure Foes: R60' Can use Channel Divinity to frighten 2 targets (save DC 16 Wisdom negates), limiting them to one move or action each turn, for 1 min or until damaged
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Holy Nimbus: Can use a bonus action to emit a 30' bright light that inflicts 8 HP radiant on foes and gives self advantage on saves vs. fiends and undead for 10 min once per long rest; can spend level 5 spell slots for additional uses
Radiant Strikes: Melee attacks inflict +1d8 HP radiant
Sacred Weapon: Can use Channel Divinity to give a weapon wielded by self +2 attack, normal or radiant damage, and a 20' bright light for 10 min
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Smite Of Protection: R30' Divine Smite gives self and allies half cover until the start of the next turn
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +10; Constitution: +2; Dexterity: +4; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +5; Wisdom: +9
Save Notes:
Aura Expansion: Has increased Aura effects
Aura Of Protection: +2 on all saves
Aura Of Courage: R30' Self and allies have immunity to frightened
Aura Of Devotion: R30' Self and allies have immunity to charmed
Aura Of Protection: R30' Gives allies +2 on all saves
Magic
Spell Slots: C0: 2; P1: 4; P2: 3; P3: 3; P4: 3; P5: 2 Attack: C: +7; D: +7; P: +8; W: +7 Spell DC: C: 15; D: 15; P: 16; W: 15
Spells:
Aid (P2 Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Aid (P2 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Aura Of Life (P4 Abju): 30' radius gives allies resistance to necrotic damage and immunity to maximum hit point reduction, and raises those with 0 hit points to 1 hit point, for concentration up to 10 min
Banishment (P4 Abju): R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Beacon Of Hope (P3 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): R30' Targets gain advantage on Wisdom and death saves and regain maximum hit points from healing for concentration up to 1 min
Command (P1 Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Commune (P5 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Divi): Deity answers 3 yes/no questions; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Create Food And Water (P3 Conj): R30' Creates 45 lb of food that lasts for 24 hr and 30 gallons of water
Daylight (P3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Detect Evil And Good (P1 Divi): R30' Reveals aberrations, celestials, elementals, feys, fiends, undead, and Hallow effects for concentration up to 10 min
Detect Poison And Disease (P1 Divi): R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Dispel Evil And Good (P5 Abju): Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead suffer disadvantage on attacks vs. self for concentration up to 1 min; a successful spell attack returns them to their home plane (save Charisma negates), and touch also ends their enchantment, fright, or possession on the creature touched
Dispel Magic (P3 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Divine Smite (P1 [Paladin's Smite] Evoc): Cast as a bonus action after hitting a target, causes the attack inflict +2d8 HP radiant, or +3d8 HP radiant on a fiend or undead [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Find Steed (P2 [Faithful Steed] Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in steed form; it has Armor Class 12, 25 hit points, a 60' Speed, and' and can communicate telepathically with self up to 1 mile an Intelligence of at least 6, can understand at least 1 language, and can communicate telepathically with self for 1 mile [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1 and hit points by 10; level 4 also gives a 60' fly Speed]
Flame Strike (P5 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 5d6 HP fire and 5d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP fire and radiant]
Freedom Of Movement (P4 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30 swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Geas (P5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Guardian Of Faith (P4 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Conj): R30' 10' radius inflicts 20 HP radiant on hostile creatures (save Dexterity half) for 8 hr or until 60 HP inflicted
Heroism (P1 Ench): Touched gains immunity to becoming frightened and +2 temporary hit points each rd for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Locate Creature (P4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Magic Circle (P3 Abju): R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead, for 1 hr [+Level extends the duration +1 hr]
Protection From Evil And Good (P1 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charm, fright, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Poison (P2 Abju): Touched recovers from poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Shield Of Faith (P1 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Zone Of Truth (P2 Ench): R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Zone Of Truth (P2 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Ench): R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Magic Notes:
Blessed Warrior: Knows 2 Cleric cantrips; can replace 1 of them when gaining a Paladin level
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 3 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Faithful Steed: Can cast Find Steed once per long rest
Lay On Hands: Can use bonus actions to heal 100 hit points per long rest and can use 5 hit points' worth to remove a poisoned condition
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Paladin's Smite: Can cast Divine Smite once per long rest
Restoring Touch: Can use 5 hit points' worth of Lay On Hands to remove a blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, paralyzed, or stunned condition
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the paladin spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 2 available vs. 3 allocated
